korean_source: 손님, 빌나는 이쪽에 내시고 지나는 의자 옆에 두세요.
analytic_sentence: Please submit your request-content here and place your carried load beside the chair.

korean_source: 네, 그런데 알파ㅸ온 면담 신청도 같이 할 수 있나요?
analytic_sentence: Yes, but can I also apply for a meeting with the teacher?

korean_source: 됩니다. 먼저 말파ㅸ온 칸에 이름을 적으시고, 아래에 빌나를 짧게 써 주세요.
analytic_sentence: Yes. First write your name in the speaker/source field, and then briefly write the request-content below.

korean_source: 알나칼ㅸ온 대출 기록도 같이 보려면 어디로 가야 하나요?
analytic_sentence: Where should I go if I also want to see the textbook loan record?

korean_source: 복도 끝 알나ㅸ앙 안으로 들어가시면 됩니다. 오늘은 보나ㅸ앙 열람도 열려 있어요.
analytic_sentence: You can go into the library at the end of the corridor. Today access to the visual archive is also open.

korean_source: 보나ㅸ앙에는 사진만 있나요, 아니면 쓰나ㅸ앙 자료도 있나요?
analytic_sentence: Does the visual archive only have photographs, or are there document-repository materials too?

korean_source: 사진이 중심이지만, 쓰나ㅿ은 기록하고 연결되는 자료도 조금 있습니다.
analytic_sentence: Photographs are central, but there are also some materials linked to publication-channel records.

korean_source: 지나가 커서 그런데, 안에 그냥 들고 들어가도 괜찮을까요?
analytic_sentence: My carried load is large, so is it okay if I just carry it inside?

korean_source: 크면 여기 두시는 편이 좋습니다. 필요하시면 보관표를 따로 드릴게요.
analytic_sentence: If it is large, it is better to leave it here. If you need one, I will give you a separate storage tag.

korean_source: 알돈ㅸ앙 안내도도 한 장 받을 수 있을까요?
analytic_sentence: Could I get a copy of the campus-complex guide map too?

korean_source: 네, 여기 있습니다. 고치돈과 먹돈은 이 길을 따라가시면 나옵니다.
analytic_sentence: Yes, here it is. The repair place and dining place appear if you follow this road.

korean_source: 감사합니다. 그럼 먼저 빌나부터 쓰고 다시 여쭐게요.
analytic_sentence: Thank you. Then I will first write the request-content and ask again.

korean_source: 천천히 하세요. 알나닌ㅸ온 열람은 감독자 동의가 있어야 하니 그 점만 주의하시면 됩니다.
analytic_sentence: Take your time. Viewing undeciphered documents requires supervisor consent, so that is the only point you need to note.

korean_source: 네, 알겠습니다. 아까 밖 물ㅸ앙 쪽은 길이 조금 미끄럽던데 조심해야겠네요.
analytic_sentence: Yes, understood. The path near the pond outside was a bit slippery, so I should be careful.

korean_source: 맞습니다. 비가 오면 불ㅿ은도 낮게 깔리니 돌아가실 때는 동문 쪽으로 가세요.
analytic_sentence: That's right. When it rains, smoke also lies low, so when you leave please go by the east gate.
There is no letter at all.
Each child brings one ripe fruit.
The visual archive material is in the second room.
I am as fast as you.
The children walk around the pond.
Three students sit in the library.

design_notes: future neg with preverb on NEG.AUX

analytic_sentence: was going / was in the process of going
will go / will have gone (telic future)
[Someone] is eating / has it in progress.
It is raining (I directly witness it).
I said, 'I go / I am going.'
Because it rained, I do not go.
Even if it rains, I go.
If it had rained, I would not have gone.
the paper on which I write the request-content
I know that it is raining.
the person to whom I give the book
As for his coming, I know it.

korean_source: 비 머-오-칸. 글 나 가-아 느-몰-온.
analytic_sentence: It rained. Therefore I do not go.

korean_source: 나는 알나ㅸ앙-테 갔다. 헌 빌나는 못 냈다.
analytic_sentence: I went to the library. However, I could not submit the request-content.
The campus-complex is wide. Moreover, the paths are quiet.

korean_source: 빌나=흔 먼저 내고, 말파ㅸ온은 나중에 적어라.
analytic_sentence: As for the request-content, submit it first, and fill the speaker/source field later.
I myself am quiet only today.

korean_source: 비가 그친 아침, 우리는 알돈ㅸ앙 서쪽 전시관 앞에 일찍 모였다.
analytic_sentence: On the morning after the rain stopped, we gathered early in front of the west exhibition hall of the campus-complex.

korean_source: 보나ㅸ앙 문은 아직 잠겨 있었고, 복도 끝에서는 쓰나ㅸ앙 상자 둘이 벽에 기대 있었다.
analytic_sentence: The visual archive door was still locked, and two document-repository boxes were leaning against the wall at the end of the corridor.

korean_source: 나는 지나를 내려놓고 빌나 뭉치를 다시 세어 보았다.
analytic_sentence: I set down my carried load and counted the bundle of request-contents again.

korean_source: 말파ㅸ온 칸이 비어 있는 안내문이 몇 장 보여서 먼저 그 부분부터 고쳤다.
analytic_sentence: I saw several notices with the speaker/source field left blank, so I corrected that part first.

korean_source: 안쪽 방에는 알나닌ㅸ온처럼 아직 풀리지 않은 기록 상자가 따로 쌓여 있었다.
analytic_sentence: Inside the inner room, boxes of records not yet deciphered, like undeciphered documents, were stacked separately.

korean_source: 동문 쪽 창문으로 빛ㅿ은이 길게 들어오자 먼지와 불ㅿ은이 동시에 떠올랐다.
analytic_sentence: When a long path of light entered through the east window, dust and smoke rose together.

korean_source: 누군가는 먹돈에서 끓이돈 냄새가 벌써 올라온다며 아직 이른 시간을 웃어넘겼다.
analytic_sentence: Someone joked that the kitchen smell was already rising from the dining place despite the early hour.

korean_source: 나는 알파ㅸ온이 남긴 쪽지를 다시 읽고, 빌나 순서를 앞뒤로 바꾸었다.
analytic_sentence: I reread the note left by the teacher and changed the order of the request-contents.

korean_source: 사진은 보나ㅸ앙으로, 글 원본은 쓰나ㅸ앙으로, 사본은 쓰나눌로 보내자는 합의가 그때 정해졌다.
analytic_sentence: At that time it was decided that photographs would go to the visual archive, original texts to the document repository, and copies to the written residue collection.

korean_source: 한 학생은 알나칼ㅸ온을 참고해 전시 설명을 더 쉬운 말로 바꾸어 적었다.
analytic_sentence: One student consulted the textbook and rewrote the exhibition description in easier language.

korean_source: 또 다른 학생은 자라돈 옆에 둘 화분 이름표를 써 와서 꽃닌ㅸ온과 열눌 시기를 따로 구분했다.
analytic_sentence: Another student brought labels for the pots beside the growing ground and separately distinguished the flower-bud and fruiting periods.

korean_source: 오후가 되자 알돈ㅸ앙 안쪽 길은 조용해졌지만, 말나ㅿ은은 오히려 문 앞에서 더 커졌다.
analytic_sentence: By afternoon the inner paths of the campus-complex grew quiet, but the discourse flow grew louder in front of the door.

korean_source: 아이 둘은 물ㅸ앙 둘레를 돌며 왜 전시실 안에 물리ㆍ르 사진이 많은지 물었다.
analytic_sentence: Two children circled the pond and asked why there were so many photographs of waterways inside the exhibition hall.

korean_source: 나는 그 질문을 듣고 나서야 이 전시가 단순한 기록이 아니라 삶ㆍ르를 보여 주는 일이라는 생각을 했다.
analytic_sentence: Only after hearing that question did I think that this exhibition was not just a record but an attempt to show a life cycle.

korean_source: 저녁 가까이 되자 헌 빌나는 절반도 아직 처리되지 않았고, 고치돈 쪽 연락도 늦었다.
analytic_sentence: As evening approached, however, not even half of the request-contents had yet been processed, and contact from the repair place was delayed.

korean_source: 글 우리는 먼저 보나ㅸ앙 안쪽 자료부터 정리하고, 나머지는 다음 날로 넘기기로 했다.
analytic_sentence: So we decided to organize the inner visual-archive materials first and push the rest to the next day.

korean_source: 마지막으로 남은 건 말파ㅸ온이 빠진 표지 세 장과 지나 하나뿐이었다.
analytic_sentence: In the end, all that remained were three labels missing the speaker/source field and one carried load.

korean_source: 문을 닫고 나오는 길에 불ㅿ은은 거의 사라졌고, 보나ㅸ앙 유리에는 저녁 빛ㅿ은만 길게 남아 있었다.
analytic_sentence: On the way out after closing the door, the smoke had almost vanished, and only the evening light path remained long on the visual archive glass.

korean_source: 나는 접어 둔 빌나 한 장을 주머니에서 꺼내 내일 아침 맨 위에 올려둘 표시를 해 두었다.
analytic_sentence: I took out one folded request-content from my pocket and marked it so I could place it on top the next morning.

korean_source: 그날 밤, 알돈ㅸ앙 남문을 나설 때까지도 종이 냄새와 말나ㆍ르는 머리에서 완전히 떠나지 않았다.
analytic_sentence: That night, until I passed out the south gate of the campus-complex, the smell of paper and the refrain of speech did not completely leave my head.
Hello. Is registration for the repair place done here?

korean_source: 네, 여기입니다. 먼저 빌나를 쓰시고 지나는 저 의자 옆에 두시면 됩니다.
analytic_sentence: Yes, here. First write the request-content and place your carried load beside that chair.

korean_source: 말파ㅸ온 칸에는 제 이름만 적으면 되나요?
analytic_sentence: In the speaker/source field, do I only write my name?

korean_source: 네. 본인 진술이면 이름만, 다른 사람 말을 옮기면 출처도 적으시면 됩니다.
analytic_sentence: Yes. If it is your own statement, just your name; if you are reporting someone else's words, write the source too.

korean_source: 어제는 비가 와서 왔다가 그냥 돌아갔어요. 동문 쪽 불ㅿ은이 너무 낮았거든요.
analytic_sentence: Yesterday it rained, so I came and then just turned back. The smoke near the east gate was too low.

korean_source: 맞습니다. 비 오는 날은 물ㅸ앙 주변 길도 미끄럽고 불ㅿ은도 깔려서 동선이 자주 바뀝니다.
analytic_sentence: That's right. On rainy days the paths around the pond are slippery and the smoke settles low, so our routes often change.

korean_source: 알돈ㅸ앙 전체에서 검진 안내가 나가서 그래요. 아침부터 빌나가 계속 쌓이고 있습니다.
analytic_sentence: That is because a screening notice went out across the whole campus-complex. Request-contents have been piling up since morning.

korean_source: 알나ㅸ앙 쪽에서도 안내를 봤어요. 보나ㅸ앙 앞에도 같은 종이가 붙어 있더라고요.
analytic_sentence: I saw the notice near the library too. The same paper was posted in front of the visual archive.

korean_source: 네, 쓰나ㅸ앙 자료실하고 먹돈 게시판에도 붙였습니다.
analytic_sentence: Yes, we also posted it in the document repository and on the dining-place bulletin board.

korean_source: 제가 지금 적는 빌나는 바로 들어가나요?
analytic_sentence: Will the request-content I am writing now be processed right away?

korean_source: 기본 접수는 바로 됩니다. 다만 추가 검사는 알파ㅸ온 확인이나 감독자 동의가 필요할 수 있습니다.
analytic_sentence: Basic registration is immediate. However, additional tests may require confirmation from the teacher or supervisor consent.

korean_source: 그럼 기다리는 동안 알나칼ㅸ온을 좀 읽고 있어도 괜찮을까요?
analytic_sentence: Then while I wait, would it be okay if I read the textbook a bit?

korean_source: 괜찮습니다. 다만 말나ㅿ은이 커지면 복도 말고 안쪽 자리로 옮겨 주세요.
analytic_sentence: That's fine. But if the conversation flow grows loud, please move to an inner seat rather than the corridor.

korean_source: 혹시 제 기록은 나중에 쓰나눌로만 남나요?
analytic_sentence: By any chance, will my record later remain only as written residue?

korean_source: 아니요. 기본 기록은 쓰나ㅸ앙에 보관하고, 배부용 요약본만 쓰나눌로 남습니다.
analytic_sentence: No. The basic record is kept in the document repository, and only the distributable summary remains as written residue.

korean_source: 알겠습니다. 그런데 지나가 무거워서 조금만 안쪽에 두고 싶은데요.
analytic_sentence: Understood. But my carried load is heavy, so I would like to place it a little farther inside.

korean_source: 가능합니다. 되도 통로는 막지 않게 물ㅸ앙 쪽 벽 아래에 붙여 두세요.
analytic_sentence: That is possible. Moreover, to avoid blocking the passage, place it against the wall toward the pond side.

korean_source: 감사합니다. 접수 끝나면 바로 먹돈으로 가도 되겠네요.
analytic_sentence: Thank you. Once registration is over, I guess I can go straight to the dining place.

korean_source: 네, 다만 오늘은 사람이 많으니 헌 조금 늦게 가시는 편이 나을 겁니다.
analytic_sentence: Yes, but today there are many people, so however, it would be better to go a little later.

korean_source: 해가 완전히 지고 나서야 우리는 알돈ㅸ앙 북쪽 생활관 앞에 다시 모였다.
analytic_sentence: Only after the sun had fully set did we gather again in front of the north dormitory of the campus-complex.

korean_source: 낮에 끝내지 못한 빌나 몇 장과 말파ㅸ온 표지가 여전히 내 지나 안에 남아 있었다.
analytic_sentence: Several request-contents and speaker/source labels that we had not finished during the day still remained in my carried load.

korean_source: 복도 안쪽 알나ㅸ앙 분실함에는 쓰나눌 봉투가 둘 더 꽂혀 있었다.
analytic_sentence: Two more written-residue envelopes were tucked into the lost-and-found box inside the corridor library.

korean_source: 나는 창문을 열어 두었더니 물ㅸ앙 쪽에서 올라오는 찬 기운이 방 안에 오래 머물렀다.
analytic_sentence: Because I had left the window open, the cool air rising from the pond side lingered in the room for a long time.

korean_source: 멀리 먹돈에서는 늦은 끓이돈 소리가 드문드문 이어졌고, 누군가는 그 리듬을 말나ㆍ르처럼 따라 불렀다.
analytic_sentence: From the dining place, late kitchen sounds continued here and there, and someone hummed their rhythm like a refrain.

korean_source: 나는 알나칼ㅸ온 한 권을 펴 두고도 자꾸 보나ㅸ앙 유리 위에 남던 저녁 빛ㅿ은을 떠올렸다.
analytic_sentence: Even with a textbook open before me, I kept recalling the evening light-path that had remained on the visual archive glass.

korean_source: 그날 정리하지 못한 상자 안에는 알나닌ㅸ온으로 돌려야 할 종이와 쓰나ㅸ앙에 넣을 종이가 섞여 있었다.
analytic_sentence: Inside the boxes we had not sorted that day were papers that should be returned to the undeciphered-document set and papers to put into the document repository.

korean_source: 비가 다시 오면 내일 아침 동문 쪽 불ㅿ은이 낮게 깔릴 거라는 말을 누가 작게 했다.
analytic_sentence: Someone quietly said that if it rained again, smoke would lie low near the east gate the next morning.

korean_source: 글 우리는 아침 일찍 모여 먼저 보나ㅸ앙 안쪽 상자부터 비우기로 했다.
analytic_sentence: So we decided to gather early in the morning and empty the inner visual-archive boxes first.

korean_source: 되도 자라돈 화분 이름표도 함께 옮겨 두자는 말이 나와, 열눌과 꽃닌ㅸ온 구역을 다시 나누어 적었다.
analytic_sentence: Moreover, someone suggested moving the labels of the growing-ground pots as well, so we rewrote the ripe-fruit and flower-bud sections separately.

korean_source: 나는 빌나 마지막 장 아래에 작은 표식을 하나 더 그리고서야 책을 덮었다.
analytic_sentence: Only after drawing one more small mark under the last request-content did I close the book.

korean_source: 잠들기 직전까지도 알돈ㅸ앙 전체 안내도와 고치돈 창구 위치가 머릿속에서 천천히 겹쳐졌다.
analytic_sentence: Until just before falling asleep, the full campus-complex map and the position of the repair-place counter slowly overlapped in my head.

korean_source: 그 밤은 조용했지만, 조용해서 더 많은 말나ㅿ은이 마음속에서 움직였다.
analytic_sentence: That night was quiet, but because it was quiet, even more discourse-flow moved inside my mind.

korean_source: 새벽 가까이 되자 물리ㆍ르 소리가 멀리서 길게 들어와 모든 생각을 한 번에 눕혀 놓았다.
analytic_sentence: Near dawn the sound of the watercourse came in from afar and laid all thoughts down at once.

korean_source: 다음 날 아침을 생각하며 눈을 감을 때, 내 지나 맨 위에는 늘 빌나가 놓여 있다는 사실이 조금 우스웠다.
analytic_sentence: As I closed my eyes thinking of the next morning, it felt faintly absurd that there was always a request-content lying at the top of my carried load.

korean_source: 그렇지만 바로 그 반복 덕분에, 알돈ㅸ앙은 더 이상 낯선 곳이 아니라 천천히 외워지는 장면이 되었다.
analytic_sentence: Yet precisely because of that repetition, the campus-complex had become not a strange place but a scene being slowly memorized.

korean_source: 손님, 오늘은 빌나가 많아서 접수 순서가 조금 늦어집니다.
analytic_sentence: Sir/Ma'am, today there are many request-contents, so the registration order is running a little late.

korean_source: 괜찮습니다. 그동안 알나칼ㅸ온을 읽고 기다리면 되겠지요?
analytic_sentence: That is fine. In the meantime I can read the textbook and wait, right?

korean_source: 네, 그렇게 하셔도 됩니다. 다만 지나가 크면 안쪽 벽 아래에 두시는 편이 좋습니다.
analytic_sentence: Yes, that is fine. However, if your carried load is large, it is better to place it under the inner wall.

korean_source: 말파ㅸ온 칸에는 제 이름과 지도교수 이름을 같이 적어야 하나요?
analytic_sentence: In the speaker/source field, should I write both my name and my advisor's name?

korean_source: 본인 진술이면 이름만 적으셔도 되고, 남의 말을 옮기시면 출처도 함께 적어디온.
analytic_sentence: If it is your own statement, just your name is fine, and if you are relaying someone else's words, please write the source as well.

korean_source: 보나ㅸ앙 열람 신청도 같이 냈는데, 그건 어디에서 확인하나요?
analytic_sentence: I also submitted an application for visual archive access; where do I check that?

korean_source: 복도 끝 알나ㅸ앙 안쪽 데스크에서 확인하디온. 필요하시면 안내도도 한 장 드리디온.
analytic_sentence: Please check at the inner desk of the library at the end of the corridor. If you need one, I will also give you a guide map.

korean_source: 오늘 비가 와서 동문 쪽 불ㅿ은이 낮던데, 그 길로 가도 괜찮을까요?
analytic_sentence: It rained today so the smoke near the east gate is low; is it okay to go that way?

korean_source: 지금은 많이 옅어졌지만, 물ㅸ앙 옆은 아직 미끄러우니 북쪽 길로 돌아가디온.
analytic_sentence: It has thinned considerably now, but the area beside the pond is still slippery, so please go around by the north path.

korean_source: 제 기록은 나중에 쓰나눌로만 남는 건 아니지요?
analytic_sentence: My record will not later remain only as written residue, right?

korean_source: 아닙니다. 원기록은 쓰나ㅸ앙에 보관하고, 배부본만 쓰나눌로 남기디온.
analytic_sentence: No. The original record is kept in the document repository, and only the distributed copy is left as written residue.

korean_source: 감사합니다. 그럼 빌나를 먼저 다 쓰고 다시 여쭐게요.
analytic_sentence: Thank you. Then I will finish writing the request-content first and ask again.

korean_source: 천천히 하디온. 오늘은 알돈ㅸ앙 전체에서 사람이 몰려서 조금 붐비디온.
analytic_sentence: Please take your time. Today the whole campus-complex is crowded, so it is a little busy.

korean_source: 알겠습니다. 기다리는 동안 먹돈 쪽에 다녀와도 되나요?
analytic_sentence: Understood. While waiting, may I go over to the dining place?

korean_source: 네, 다녀오셔도 됩니다. 다만 순서가 오면 말파ㅸ온 이름으로 부르디온.
analytic_sentence: Yes, you may go. However, when your turn comes we will call you by the name in the speaker/source field.

korean_source: 그럼 금방 다녀오겠습니다. 지나는 여기 그대로 두어도 괜찮겠지요?
analytic_sentence: Then I will be right back. It should be okay to leave the carried load here as it is, right?

korean_source: 새벽 비가 그친 뒤, 관리팀 둘은 알돈ㅸ앙 동쪽 길부터 천천히 돌기 시작했다.
analytic_sentence: After the dawn rain stopped, two members of the facilities team began slowly making rounds from the east road of the campus-complex.

korean_source: 밤새 낮게 깔렸던 불ㅿ은은 많이 옅어졌지만, 물ㅸ앙 옆 바닥은 아직 젖어 있었다.
analytic_sentence: The smoke that had lain low all night had grown faint, but the ground beside the pond was still wet.

korean_source: 한 사람은 지나에서 접은 빌나 몇 장과 점검표를 꺼내 오늘 순서를 다시 맞췄다.
analytic_sentence: One of them took several folded request-contents and a check sheet from the carried load and rearranged the order for the day.

korean_source: 다른 사람은 말파ㅸ온이 비어 있는 공지문이 있는지부터 확인하자고 했다.
analytic_sentence: The other said they should first check whether there were notices with the speaker/source field left blank.

korean_source: 복도 끝 알나ㅸ앙 문은 조금 일찍 열려 있었고, 안쪽에는 알나닌ㅸ온 상자 둘이 그대로 남아 있었다.
analytic_sentence: The library at the end of the corridor was open a little early, and two boxes of undeciphered documents were still inside.

korean_source: 어제 쓰나ㅸ앙으로 옮기지 못한 종이들이 있어서, 그들은 먼저 분류표를 다시 읽었다.
analytic_sentence: Because there were papers they had not managed to move to the document repository yesterday, they reread the sorting chart first.

korean_source: 사본은 쓰나눌로, 사진은 보나ㅸ앙으로, 원본 설명문은 다시 알나칼ㅸ온 참고 뒤에 고쳐 적기로 했다.
analytic_sentence: They decided to send copies to written residue, photographs to the visual archive, and the original captions to be rewritten after consulting the textbook again.

korean_source: 동문 쪽 계단에서는 빛ㅿ은이 물기 위에서 길게 흔들려, 마치 보나눌 같은 잔상을 잠깐 남겼다.
analytic_sentence: On the stairway near the east gate, the path of light trembled long across the wet surface, briefly leaving something like an afterimage.

korean_source: 하지만 누구도 그 장면을 오래 보지 못했다. 먹돈 쪽 끓이돈 소리가 곧 복도 전체를 채웠기 때문이다.
analytic_sentence: But no one could keep looking at the scene for long, because the kitchen sounds from the dining place soon filled the whole corridor.

korean_source: 점검표 첫 줄에는 자라돈 화분 정리와 열눌 구역 재표기가 적혀 있었다.
analytic_sentence: The first line of the inspection sheet called for arranging the growing-ground pots and relabeling the ripe-fruit section.

korean_source: 꽃닌ㅸ온 구획은 밤새 바람에 뒤집힌 이름표가 많아서, 둘은 하나씩 다시 꽂아 두었다.
analytic_sentence: The flower-bud section had many labels flipped over by the wind during the night, so the two of them reset them one by one.

korean_source: 되도 고치돈 쪽 안내문도 함께 갈아야 한다는 말이 나와, 길 끝 창구까지 한 번 더 걸었다.
analytic_sentence: Moreover, someone said the notices near the repair place also needed changing, so they walked once more to the counter at the end of the hall.

korean_source: 창구 옆에는 전날 남겨 둔 빌나 뭉치가 그대로 있었고, 지나 하나가 의자 밑으로 밀려 들어가 있었다.
analytic_sentence: Beside the counter, the bundle of request-contents left there the previous day remained as it was, and one carried load had slipped beneath a chair.

korean_source: 그들은 먼저 말파ㅸ온 칸을 채운 뒤, 알돈ㅸ앙 북쪽 안내도와 실제 길이 어긋난 부분을 연필로 표시했다.
analytic_sentence: They first filled in the speaker/source field, then marked in pencil the places where the north campus map and the actual road no longer matched.

korean_source: 한 학생이 와서 보나ㅸ앙 열람 시간이 바뀌었냐고 묻자, 둘 중 하나가 오늘은 조금 늦어진다고 설명했다.
analytic_sentence: When a student came and asked whether visual archive access hours had changed, one of the two explained that it would start a little late today.

korean_source: 말나ㅿ은은 길지 않았지만, 아침 공기가 차서인지 말나ㆍ르처럼 같은 문장이 몇 번 되돌아왔다.
analytic_sentence: The flow of conversation was not long, but perhaps because the morning air was cold, the same sentence returned several times like a refrain.

korean_source: 정오 가까이 되자 물리ㆍ르 냄새와 먹돈 냄새가 함께 올라와 알돈ㅸ앙 전체가 천천히 데워지는 듯했다.
analytic_sentence: Near noon, the smell of the watercourse and the dining place rose together, and it felt as if the whole campus-complex were slowly warming.

korean_source: 그때서야 어젯밤 미뤄 둔 보나ㅸ앙 안쪽 상자도 결국 열어야 한다는 결정이 내려졌다.
analytic_sentence: Only then was the decision made that the inner visual-archive boxes postponed last night would have to be opened after all.

korean_source: 상자 안에는 쓰나ㅿ은 기록과 전시 설명 원고가 섞여 있었고, 알파ㅸ온 메모도 몇 장 끼어 있었다.
analytic_sentence: Inside the boxes were mixed publication-channel records and exhibition drafts, with several notes from the teacher tucked in as well.

korean_source: 둘은 설명문 순서를 다시 정리하며 빌나 맨 아래에 있던 오래된 표지를 따로 빼 두었다.
analytic_sentence: As they rearranged the order of the captions, they set aside an old label that had been at the bottom of the request-contents.

korean_source: 그 종이에는 이미 지워진 말파ㅸ온 흔적이 남아 있어, 누가 처음 적었는지 알 수 없었다.
analytic_sentence: On that paper remained traces of a speaker/source field already erased, so it was impossible to tell who had first written it.

korean_source: 한 사람은 그 흔적이 보나눌처럼 눈에 걸린다고 말했지만, 다른 사람은 웃고만 말았다.
analytic_sentence: One person said the trace snagged in the eye like an afterimage, but the other only laughed.

korean_source: 오후가 깊어질 무렵, 알나ㅸ앙 앞 길은 다시 조용해졌고 지나들도 하나둘 주인을 찾아갔다.
analytic_sentence: By late afternoon, the road in front of the library grew quiet again, and one by one the carried loads found their owners.

korean_source: 마지막 점검은 동문 쪽 불ㅿ은과 물ㅸ앙 가장자리였다.
analytic_sentence: The final inspection concerned the east-gate smoke and the edge of the pond.

korean_source: 모든 표식을 마치고 나자, 두 사람은 이제 알돈ㅸ앙을 눈으로 외우게 되었다고 거의 동시에 말했다.
analytic_sentence: Once all the markings were done, the two of them said almost at the same time that they had now begun to memorize the campus-complex with their eyes.

korean_source: 안녕하세요. 오늘 보나ㅸ앙 열람과 알나ㅸ앙 자료 대출을 같이 하려고 왔습니다.
analytic_sentence: Hello. I came today to use the visual archive and borrow library materials together.

korean_source: 네, 어서 오디온. 먼저 빌나를 쓰시고 지나는 오른쪽 선반 아래에 두시디온.
analytic_sentence: Yes, welcome. Please write the request-content first and place the carried load under the shelf on the right.

korean_source: 말파ㅸ온 칸에는 제 이름만 적으면 되나요, 아니면 지도교수 이름도 함께 적어야 하나요?
analytic_sentence: In the speaker/source field should I write only my name, or do I need to add my advisor's name as well?

korean_source: 본인 진술이면 이름만 적으셔도 됩니다. 남의 말을 옮기시면 출처도 함께 적어디온.
analytic_sentence: If it is your own statement, just your name is enough. If you are relaying someone else's words, please also write the source.

korean_source: 오늘은 사람이 많은가요? 복도 쪽 말나ㅿ은이 생각보다 크네요.
analytic_sentence: Are there many people today? The flow of conversation in the corridor is louder than I expected.

korean_source: 네, 알돈ㅸ앙 전체에서 전시 안내와 고치돈 공지가 함께 나가서 조금 붐비디온.
analytic_sentence: Yes, because both the exhibition guide and the repair-place notice went out across the whole campus-complex, it is a bit crowded.

korean_source: 그럼 기다리는 동안 알나칼ㅸ온을 조금 읽고 있어도 괜찮을까요?
analytic_sentence: Then while I wait, would it be alright if I read the textbook a little?

korean_source: 괜찮디온. 다만 안쪽 자리에 앉으시면 알나닌ㅸ온 상자를 옮길 때 방해가 덜 됩니다.
analytic_sentence: That is fine. However, if you sit at an inner seat, you will interfere less when we move the boxes of undeciphered documents.

korean_source: 보나ㅸ앙 안쪽에는 사진만 있나요? 어제는 쓰나ㅸ앙 자료도 조금 있다고 들었습니다.
analytic_sentence: Are there only photographs inside the visual archive? Yesterday I heard there were also some document-repository materials.

korean_source: 사진이 중심이지만, 전시 설명에 필요한 쓰나ㅿ은 기록과 사본은 일부 함께 두디온.
analytic_sentence: Photographs are central, but we also keep some publication-channel records and copies needed for the exhibition captions together.

korean_source: 제 기록은 나중에 쓰나눌로만 남는 건 아니지요?
analytic_sentence: My record will not later remain only as written residue, right?

korean_source: 아닙니다. 원기록은 쓰나ㅸ앙에 보관하고, 배부용 정리본만 쓰나눌로 남기디온.
analytic_sentence: No. The original record is kept in the document repository, and only the handout summary is left as written residue.

korean_source: 밖에 비가 다시 오는 것 같던데, 동문 길로 돌아가도 괜찮을까요?
analytic_sentence: It seems to be raining outside again; would it be alright to return by the east-gate path?

korean_source: 지금은 불ㅿ은이 많이 옅어졌지만, 물ㅸ앙 옆은 미끄러우니 북쪽 길로 돌아가디온.
analytic_sentence: The smoke has grown much thinner now, but the area beside the pond is slippery, so please go around by the north path.

korean_source: 알겠습니다. 혹시 먹돈 쪽에 다녀오는 동안 순서가 오면 어떻게 하나요?
analytic_sentence: Understood. If my turn comes while I am over at the dining place, what happens?

korean_source: 괜찮디온. 순서가 오면 말파ㅸ온 이름으로 한 번 부르고, 안 계시면 잠시 뒤 다시 부르디온.
analytic_sentence: That is fine. When your turn comes, we call once by the name in the speaker/source field, and if you are not present we call again after a short while.

korean_source: 그러면 지나만 여기 두고 잠깐 다녀와도 되겠네요.
analytic_sentence: Then I can just leave the carried load here and step out for a moment.

korean_source: 네, 다만 통로를 막지 않게 선반 안쪽으로 조금 더 밀어 두시디온.
analytic_sentence: Yes, but please push it a bit farther inside the shelf so it does not block the passage.

korean_source: 감사합니다. 어제 유리 위에 남은 빛이 보나눌처럼 오래 남아서 아직도 기억에 걸려 있습니다.
analytic_sentence: Thank you. Yesterday the light left on the glass remained like an afterimage for a long time, and it is still caught in my memory.

korean_source: 그럴 때가 있디온. 전시실 불빛은 저녁이 되면 유리마다 다르게 남기디온.
analytic_sentence: That happens sometimes. By evening the exhibition lights remain differently on each pane of glass.

korean_source: 오늘도 안쪽 보나ㅸ앙 유리에는 빛ㅿ은이 길게 남았나요?
analytic_sentence: Has a long path of light remained on the inner visual-archive glass today too?

korean_source: 조금 남았디온. 다만 지금은 사람들이 많아 먼저 빌나부터 처리하는 편이 낫디온.
analytic_sentence: A little remains. However, because there are many people now, it is better to process the request-contents first.

korean_source: 네, 그럼 제가 알나칼ㅸ온을 읽고 있는 동안 차례가 오면 불러 주세요.
analytic_sentence: Yes, then please call me when my turn comes while I am reading the textbook.

korean_source: 알겠디온. 천천히 보시고, 필요하시면 알파ㅸ온 확인도 함께 도와디온.
analytic_sentence: Understood. Please take your time looking, and if needed I can also help with confirmation from the teacher.

korean_source: 고맙습니다. 오늘은 접수대 말나ㅿ은까지도 이상하게 차분해서 오래 기억에 남을 것 같네요.
analytic_sentence: Thank you. Today even the flow of conversation at the desk feels strangely calm, so I think it will stay in memory for a long time.
